rules.description: Runtime state (sockets, db, telemetry, models) must live under the canonical runtime tree (var/…) and must not persist under /tmp. Worker sockets must resolve under /var/run/aos and reject /tmp.
Worker lifecycle states: created → registered → healthy → draining → stopped/error; transitions must follow this ordering and be tenant-scoped in storage/telemetry.
Backend selection must be a single deterministic rule based on capabilities/config; model cache keys must disambiguate backend + manifest and eviction must be predictable.

All inference/replay routes through InferenceCore; routing is sorted by score DESC then index ASC with Q15 denominator 32767. Policy hooks must run before worker invocation; replay and live paths share the same routing logic and decision records.
Telemetry events must use a consistent schema and carry tenant/model context; routing/replay metadata must be sufficient to reconstruct decisions.
Adapters/base models and their lifecycles must carry tenant identifiers everywhere; no cross-tenant leakage or configuration mixing.
Each explicit rule above must have at least one covering test aligned with the current specification.

matches.evidence: Worker sockets reject /tmp and default to /var/run/aos/{tenant}/worker.sock with ./var fallback only when prod dir cannot be created; control-plane socket defaults to /var/run/adapteros.sock.
Telemetry, manifest-cache, adapters, database, and index root path resolvers now reject /tmp via reject_tmp_persistent_path guarding env/default values.
Unit tests cover /tmp rejection for telemetry/manifest-cache/adapters/db/index-root env overrides and default paths.
WorkerStatus enum documents created→registered→healthy→draining→stopped/error transitions and enforces them via valid_transitions/transition_to.

gaps: Mapping of WorkerStatus to database schema and telemetry events not validated in this pass (tenant scoping of persisted states unverified).

matches.evidence: BackendStrategy.select_backend selects deterministically from capability flags; ModelHandleCache keys on (backend_type, manifest_hash) per factory docs.

gaps: Eviction behavior and UI/telemetry exposure of cache state not verified in this pass.

matches.evidence: InferenceCore explicitly asserts it is the only execution path and notes deterministic routing (score desc, index tie-break) with replay sharing the same path.
Q15 denominator locked to ROUTER_GATE_Q15_DENOM=32767.0 with dedicated unit test.
Policy hook parity covered for live vs replay (OnBefore/OnAfter) via integration test.
Unified telemetry schema requires IdentityEnvelope and now validates tenant_id via TelemetryFilters::validate/with_tenant.
TelemetryBuffer::query enforces tenant filters; missing tenant returns validation error.
Tests cover telemetry filter validation and buffer query requiring tenant context.

gaps: Adapter/base model lifecycle code and DB queries were not traced in this pass to confirm tenant scoping on every operation.
Cross-tenant leak protections in DB triggers (migration 0131) not revalidated here.

matches.evidence: Path resolver unit tests now cover /tmp rejection for telemetry/manifest-cache/adapters/db/index-root env overrides.
Telemetry tests enforce tenant filters and buffer query validation.
Routing tests lock Q15 denominator and policy hooks across live/replay.
